title: 2048 Cube Shooting Merge
description: 2048 Cube Shooting Merge is an addictive merge puzzle online game for those who like challenging brain teasers and logic puzzle merge games. This game is in 3D with crazy fun physics! The squares dont stay in place, they pop up. The gameplay is much simpler. If you like 2048 games and want to play a novel mode, join the game.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
